title: Обработка текстовых документов
short_description: Use when the task involves reading, creating, or editing `.docx` documents, especially when formatting or layout fidelity matters;  prefer `python-docx` plus the bundled `scripts/render_docx.py` for visual checks.
full_description: Use when the task involves reading, creating, or editing `.docx` documents, especially when formatting or layout fidelity matters;  prefer `python-docx` plus the bundled `scripts/render_docx.py` for visual checks.

review.summary: Skill для работы с текстовыми документами: открыть файл, извлечь текст, проанализировать содержимое, найти информацию или подготовить документ для обработки и индексации.

title: Конвертация документов в .MD
short_description: Use this skill when you need to convert documents into Markdown for further processing. It takes files from the vault docs/source directory, converts them into Markdown format, and saves the results into docs/derived-md. This enables the agent to read, search, and analyze document content.
full_description: Use this skill when you need to convert documents into Markdown for further processing. It takes files from the vault docs/source directory, converts them into Markdown format, and saves the results into docs/derived-md. This enables the agent to read, search, and analyze document content.

review.summary: Defines the canonical vault structure, including folders, entity types, frontmatter schema, and linking rules. Acts as the foundation for all other skills.

title: Анализ PDF
short_description: Use when tasks involve reading, creating, or reviewing PDF files where rendering and layout matter;  prefer visual checks by rendering pages (Poppler) and use Python tools such as `reportlab`, `pdfplumber`, and `pypdf` for generation and extraction.
full_description: Use when tasks involve reading, creating, or reviewing PDF files where rendering and layout matter;  prefer visual checks by rendering pages (Poppler) and use Python tools such as `reportlab`, `pdfplumber`, and `pypdf` for generation and extraction.

review.summary: Skill для работы с PDF-документами: извлечь текст, проанализировать содержимое, найти информацию или подготовить данные для дальнейшей обработки и индексации.

title: Поиск по базе знаний
short_description: Use this skill when you need to search across the local vault. It allows you to find relevant information in Markdown files including documents, emails, events, and notes using full-text search.
full_description: Use this skill when you need to search across the local vault. It allows you to find relevant information in Markdown files including documents, emails, events, and notes using full-text search.

review.summary: Provides local full-text search using qmd across all markdown files in the vault.

title: Анализ изображений и скриншотов
short_description: Use when the user explicitly asks for a desktop or system screenshot (full screen, specific app or window, or a pixel region),  or when tool-specific capture capabilities are unavailable and an OS-level capture is needed.
full_description: Use when the user explicitly asks for a desktop or system screenshot (full screen, specific app or window, or a pixel region),  or when tool-specific capture capabilities are unavailable and an OS-level capture is needed.

review.summary: Skill для анализа скриншотов или изображений: извлечь текст, понять содержимое, описать интерфейс или найти информацию на изображении.

title: Установка и настройка окружения
short_description: Use this skill when you need to initialize or verify the bundle environment. It installs required dependencies, prepares the vault, and ensures that all tools are available for other skills to function correctly.
full_description: Use this skill when you need to initialize or verify the bundle environment. It installs required dependencies, prepares the vault, and ensures that all tools are available for other skills to function correctly.

review.summary: Handles installation and verification of the bundle environment and dependencies.

title: Работа с презентациями
short_description: Create and edit presentation slide decks (`.pptx`) with PptxGenJS, bundled layout helpers, and render/validation utilities.  Use when tasks involve building a new PowerPoint deck, recreating slides from screenshots/PDFs/reference decks, modifying slide content while preserving editable output,  adding charts/diagrams/visuals, or diagnosing layout issues such as overflow, overlaps, and font substitution.
full_description: Create and edit presentation slide decks (`.pptx`) with PptxGenJS, bundled layout helpers, and render/validation utilities.  Use when tasks involve building a new PowerPoint deck, recreating slides from screenshots/PDFs/reference decks, modifying slide content while preserving editable output,  adding charts/diagrams/visuals, or diagnosing layout issues such as overflow, overlaps, and font substitution.

review.summary: Skill для работы с презентациями (PPT, PPTX, Google Slides): извлечение текста со слайдов,  анализ структуры и содержания, поиск информации и подготовка данных для дальнейшей обработки или конвертации.

title: Анализ таблиц
short_description: Use when tasks involve creating, editing, analyzing, or formatting spreadsheets (`.xlsx`, `.csv`, `.tsv`) with formula-aware workflows, cached recalculation, and visual review.
full_description: Use when tasks involve creating, editing, analyzing, or formatting spreadsheets (`.xlsx`, `.csv`, `.tsv`) with formula-aware workflows, cached recalculation, and visual review.

review.summary: Skill для работы с табличными данными (Excel, Google Sheets): анализ, фильтрация, агрегация, вычисление метрик и подготовка отчетов на основе данных.

title: Работа с задачами
short_description: Use this in the case user asks you to create a new task, to check the status of existing tasks, to close tasks, and to register bugs. Also use this skill to get the most important task to work on.
full_description: Use this in the case user asks you to create a new task, to check the status of existing tasks, to close tasks, and to register bugs. Also use this skill to get the most important task to work on.

review.summary: Skill для работы с задачами: создание новых задач, проверка статуса, закрытие задач, регистрация багов и выбор наиболее важной задачи.

title: Расшифровка аудио
short_description: Transcribe audio files to text with optional diarization and known-speaker hints.  Use when a user asks to transcribe speech from audio/video, extract text from recordings, or label speakers in interviews or meetings.
full_description: Transcribe audio files to text with optional diarization and known-speaker hints.  Use when a user asks to transcribe speech from audio/video, extract text from recordings, or label speakers in interviews or meetings.

review.summary: Skill для работы с аудио: преобразование речи в текст (speech-to-text), расшифровка записей, извлечение содержания разговоров и подготовка текста для дальнейшего анализа.

title: Просмотр структуры хранилища данных Vault
short_description: Use this skill when you need to understand how data is structured in the local vault. It defines where different entities (mail, events, contacts, documents, drafts) are stored, what metadata they contain, and how they are linked together. This skill should be used before reading or writing any files in the vault.
full_description: Use this skill when you need to understand how data is structured in the local vault. It defines where different entities (mail, events, contacts, documents, drafts) are stored, what metadata they contain, and how they are linked together. This skill should be used before reading or writing any files in the vault.

review.summary: Defines the canonical vault structure, including folders, entity types, frontmatter schema, and linking rules. Acts as the foundation for all other skills.

title: Работа с почтой
short_description: Use weavmail CLI to manage emails for the current task. Use when you need to read, send, reply to, or move emails as part of completing a task.
full_description: Use weavmail CLI to manage emails for the current task. Use when you need to read, send, reply to, or move emails as part of completing a task.

review.summary: Skill для работы с электронной почтой через IMAP: синхронизация писем, поиск и чтение сообщений,  а также сохранение переписки в локальном виде (например, Markdown) для последующего анализа и обработки.
